response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, native-level Japanese proficiency, and any demonstrated background in embedded networking, MACsec, 802.1X, or switch firmware development — all essential for this security-focused embedded role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems including embedded-like projects (e.g., Voice, DWS)
Active contributor to open-source tools and technical education
concerns: No evidence of C programming in UNIX embedded environments or firmware development
Japanese language proficiency is absent — a hard requirement for the role
No experience with LAN-switch security protocols, Linux kernel analysis, or embedded networking technologies

key_factors.factor: No exposure to switch security protocols (802.1X, MACsec)
